breaks.scene_hint: A quieter, reflective dialogue scene — Hamlet broods alone after a tense family gathering; emotional tone is still and introspective
A mid-story transitional moment — courtiers mill about the castle; no major confrontations are unfolding
A lull between dramatic beats — secondary characters exchange words in a corridor; the main action briefly pauses

conservative_breaks.scene_hint: Post-family-gathering solitude — Hamlet reflects quietly; no plot-critical reveals are imminent
A calm transitional stretch at the story's midpoint — the court is at rest and no confrontation is happening

relaxed_breaks.scene_hint: Early scene wind-down — the initial shock of Hamlet's homecoming has settled; characters disperse after a formal gathering
Introspective solo moment for Hamlet — still and melancholy; no new information is being delivered
Midpoint transition — the pace slows between two major dramatic arcs; a safe and roomy window
Brief corridor interlude with minor characters — a breather before the story accelerates toward its conclusion
